channel.title: Life on Yuntong Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Yuntong Zhang

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello! I am an aspiring software developer, university student studying computer science and economics, and an enthusiastic learner in information security and natural sciences. I enjoy learning new technology and use my expertise to solve problems. Beyond academics, I am also interested in trading despite that I am still a newbie in the field. I spent most of my free time playing basketball, skating and reading. My Life Story Early Days (well not that early) I was born in China and has spent the first 15 years of my life in Tianjin, a beautiful international port city on the east coast of China.
